scriptItem.label: Save Scene As...
scriptItem.scriptCode: import os, sys root = hou.text.expandString("$FIVEHUB") for p in (root, os.path.join(root, "houdini")): if p and p not in sys.path: sys.path.insert(0, p) import fivehub_houdini fivehub_houdini.save_scene_as()

scriptItem.label: Increment Save
scriptItem.scriptCode: import os, sys root = hou.text.expandString("$FIVEHUB") for p in (root, os.path.join(root, "houdini")): if p and p not in sys.path: sys.path.insert(0, p) import fivehub_houdini fivehub_houdini.increment_save()

scriptItem.label: Load Scene...
scriptItem.scriptCode: import os, sys root = hou.text.expandString("$FIVEHUB") for p in (root, os.path.join(root, "houdini")): if p and p not in sys.path: sys.path.insert(0, p) import fivehub_houdini fivehub_houdini.load_scene()

scriptItem.label: Publish Selection...
scriptItem.scriptCode: import os, sys root = hou.text.expandString("$FIVEHUB") for p in (root, os.path.join(root, "houdini")): if p and p not in sys.path: sys.path.insert(0, p) import fivehub_houdini fivehub_houdini.publish()

scriptItem.label: Create Publish Node
scriptItem.scriptCode: import os, sys root = hou.text.expandString("$FIVEHUB") for p in (root, os.path.join(root, "houdini")): if p and p not in sys.path: sys.path.insert(0, p) import fivehub_houdini fivehub_houdini.create_publish_node()

scriptItem.label: Load Published Asset...
scriptItem.scriptCode: import os, sys root = hou.text.expandString("$FIVEHUB") for p in (root, os.path.join(root, "houdini")): if p and p not in sys.path: sys.path.insert(0, p) import fivehub_houdini fivehub_houdini.load_asset()

scriptItem.label: Import Staged From Hub
scriptItem.scriptCode: import os, sys root = hou.text.expandString("$FIVEHUB") for p in (root, os.path.join(root, "houdini")): if p and p not in sys.path: sys.path.insert(0, p) import fivehub_houdini fivehub_houdini.import_staged()

scriptItem.label: Submit Render...
scriptItem.scriptCode: import os, sys root = hou.text.expandString("$FIVEHUB") for p in (root, os.path.join(root, "houdini")): if p and p not in sys.path: sys.path.insert(0, p) import fivehub_houdini fivehub_houdini.submit_render()

scriptItem.label: Publish Shot Assembly
scriptItem.scriptCode: import os, sys root = hou.text.expandString("$FIVEHUB") for p in (root, os.path.join(root, "houdini")): if p and p not in sys.path: sys.path.insert(0, p) import fivehub_houdini fivehub_houdini.publish_shot_assembly()

scriptItem.label: Pipeline Tools...
scriptItem.scriptCode: import os, sys root = hou.text.expandString("$FIVEHUB") for p in (root, os.path.join(root, "houdini")): if p and p not in sys.path: sys.path.insert(0, p) import fivehub_houdini fivehub_houdini.pipeline_tools()

scriptItem.label: Open Hub App
scriptItem.scriptCode: import os, sys root = hou.text.expandString("$FIVEHUB") for p in (root, os.path.join(root, "houdini")): if p and p not in sys.path: sys.path.insert(0, p) import fivehub_houdini fivehub_houdini.launch_hub()

scriptItem.label: Check for Updates
scriptItem.scriptCode: import os, sys root = hou.text.expandString("$FIVEHUB") for p in (root, os.path.join(root, "houdini")): if p and p not in sys.path: sys.path.insert(0, p) import fivehub_houdini fivehub_houdini.check_updates()

scriptItem.label: Reload Pipeline
scriptItem.scriptCode: import os, sys root = hou.text.expandString("$FIVEHUB") for p in (root, os.path.join(root, "houdini")): if p and p not in sys.path: sys.path.insert(0, p) import fivehub_houdini fivehub_houdini.reload_fivehub()
